pattern_to_learn: Site-wide Lighthouse crawl from sitemap/internal links; parallel audits; SEO/performance issue inventory.
artimagehub_application: Run buyer-page-only audits before/after SEO releases so traffic growth does not amplify slow pages.
next_action: Trial on /old-photo-restoration + buyer pages once apex serves latest build.
evidence_gate: Report exists with affected URLs + fixes selected; no blanket site rewrite.

pattern_to_learn: Self-hosted keyword position tracker with domains/keywords and change notifications/API.
artimagehub_application: Track only buyer terms that map to checkout-intent pages, especially US pricing/no-subscription and BR pt-BR terms.
next_action: Evaluate self-host or lightweight CSV runner from buyer-keyword-watchlist.tsv.
evidence_gate: Daily/weekly rank snapshot tied to action queue; no vanity keyword expansion.

pattern_to_learn: Open-source SEO audit model: crawl pages, find title/meta/canonical/link problems, monitor regressions.
artimagehub_application: Use as reference for local buyer-page audit checks: title/H1/canonical/schema/hreflang/internal links.
next_action: Extract minimal checks into project script before full tool adoption.
evidence_gate: Audit outputs actionable page defects and owner; no generic score chasing.

pattern_to_learn: Request queue, retries, HTTP/browser crawling, structured datasets for discovery workflows.
artimagehub_application: Discover public threads/pages where users ask about restoring old photos, price, subscriptions, or tool alternatives.
next_action: Prototype a polite discovery queue; manual posting still requires user/auth evidence.
evidence_gate: Lead URL + context + suggested reply + no-post claim without final URL/screenshot.

pattern_to_learn: Structured web research agent that turns pages into usable research data for agents.
artimagehub_application: Research competitor pages/forum discussions and turn them into page gaps, FAQs, comparison angles, and outreach leads.
next_action: Use for research synthesis only; no autonomous spam/posting.
evidence_gate: Each finding maps to page update, keyword, FAQ, or lead queue row.

pattern_to_learn: Changed URL submission + sitemap freshness as release gate.
artimagehub_application: Every buyer page release must appear in sitemap and be submitted to IndexNow after live verification.
next_action: Keep scripts/submit-indexnow.js buyer list in sync; later derive from sitemap.
evidence_gate: 200 URL + sitemap inclusion + successful API response.

pattern_to_learn: Open-source/self-hostable crawler with CSV export and SPA auditing angle.
artimagehub_application: Use as comparison/reference for what our buyer-page audit should export: URL,status,title,canonical,meta,links,issue.
next_action: Review for lightweight CSV output fields before writing local crawler.
evidence_gate: Only adopt fields that generate ArtImageHub fixes.

pattern_to_learn: Localhost SEO audit and URL submission CLI model.
artimagehub_application: Mirror the localhost audit workflow for pre-release checks against the clean Next build before public deploy.
next_action: Prototype npm script for buyer URL audit from local server.
evidence_gate: CI/local report passes for revenue URLs before pushing SEO batches.

pattern_to_learn: Recent open-source CLI claims codebase+GSC audit, quick fixes, blog briefs, pSEO plans.
artimagehub_application: Investigate when GitHub/npm package is reliably identifiable; useful only if it consumes GSC and outputs concrete fixes.
next_action: Watch; do not depend on it yet.
evidence_gate: Source package verified + outputs reproducible actions.
